title: Fix overlap between 'Find local pest technicians' icon and headings

requirements.text: Fix the overlapping issue between the 'Find local pest technicians' icon and the headings in the LocationFinder component by adding proper spacing or layout adjustments

quotes: they are still over lapping each other the find local pest technicians icon and them

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Find local pest technicians' icon does not overlap with any headings
All text remains fully readable without obstruction
The layout maintains proper visual hierarchy and spacing

constraints: Do not modify the LocationFinder component's core map functionality
Maintain the existing UI component structure from shadcn/ui
nonGoals: Changing the functionality of the technician search feature
